name: openara
description: OpenAra — open-source macOS Computer Use MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Control desktop apps from Codex with the OpenAra local server
interface.longDescription: OpenAra is an open-source macOS automation server for Computer Use. It exposes nine desktop-control MCP tools through a local macOS app bundle, preferring semantic Accessibility paths before falling back to coordinate input — so the agent can drive your apps without stealing focus or your real cursor.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the current UI state of this desktop app without stealing focus when possible
Open a new local document with keyboard shortcuts first, then type content without moving my real pointer unless required
Drive the fixture app and verify the nine computer-use tools still behave correctly
